_meta.context: This re-merge is the Gate Owner's response to my prior MUST-FIX-BEFORE-CONSOLIDATE (demote 4 closed/operating-status-unverified rows). qa_mustfix_actions.pass == 'pre-wave3 QA MUST-FIX' — it is the demotion ONLY; no Wave 3 wave and no new Fleet B wave landed in this re-merge.

Documented in manifest.qa_mustfix_actions with reason: self-flag as candidate / closed / operating-status-unverified; active-door operating status is NOT verifiable by consolidate_census.py --validate-only (schema/DB-state gate only). summary: The Gate Owner applied my MUST-FIX exactly: a pure 4-row demotion (ready 210->206), documented in qa_mustfix_actions, dentist_multi tier preserved as intelligence. Checks 1, 2, 5, 6, 7, 8 PASS. Checks 3 & 4 are N/A for this re-merge (it is the pre-wave3 demotion only; no Wave 3 / new Fleet B wave landed). All network-intelligence sidecars survived and held protected networks did not leak. No new evidence was re-judged (operating status is out-of-scope for consolidate_census.py --validate-only).

consolidate_authorization.reason: consolidate_census.py --allow-db-write is NOT authorized until the user explicitly says 'consolidate approved manifest'. consolidation_status remains FROZEN. This QA pass clears the schema/DB-state demotion only; it is not a consolidate trigger.
consolidate_authorization.schema_db_state_validator_note: If/when a structural pre-flight is wanted, the correct command is: python3 scrapers/consolidate_census.py --validate-only  (NEVER --allow-db-write). That validator gates SCHEMA/DB-state only; it does NOT re-judge evidence or operating status.
